arguments.command:
# Create a minimal ELF with the right build ID for dotnet-symbol to use
cd /tmp
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import struct

# Build ID bytes
buildid_hex = "4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801"
buildid = bytes.fromhex(buildid_hex)

# Create a minimal ARM64 ELF with a .note.gnu.build-id section
# ELF header (64-byte for 64-bit)
e_ident = b'\x7fELF' + b'\x02' + b'\x01' + b'\x01' + b'\x00' * 9  # 16 bytes
e_type = struct.pack('<H', 3)       # ET_DYN
e_machine = struct.pack('<H', 183)  # EM_AARCH64
e_version = struct.pack('<I', 1)
e_entry = struct.pack('<Q', 0)
e_phoff = struct.pack('<Q', 64)     # program headers right after ELF header
e_shoff = struct.pack('<Q', 0)      # no section headers for simplicity
e_flags = struct.pack('<I', 0)
e_ehsize = struct.pack('<H', 64)
e_phentsize = struct.pack('<H', 56)
e_phnum = struct.pack('<H', 1)      # one PT_NOTE
e_shentsize = struct.pack('<H', 64)
e_shnum = struct.pack('<H', 0)
e_shstrndx = struct.pack('<H', 0)

elf_header = (e_ident + e_type + e_machine + e_version + e_entry + e_phoff +
              e_shoff + e_flags + e_ehsize + e_phentsize + e_phnum +
              e_shentsize + e_shnum + e_shstrndx)

# Build the note content
# Note header: namesz, descsz, type
note_name = b'GNU\x00'
note_namesz = struct.pack('<I', 4)    # "GNU\0"
note_descsz = struct.pack('<I', len(buildid))
note_type = struct.pack('<I', 3)      # NT_GNU_BUILD_ID
note_content = note_namesz + note_descsz + note_type + note_name + buildid

# PT_NOTE program header
note_offset = 64 + 56  # after ELF header + 1 phdr
p_type = struct.pack('<I', 4)  # PT_NOTE
p_flags = struct.pack('<I', 4) # PF_R
p_offset = struct.pack('<Q', note_offset)
p_vaddr = struct.pack('<Q', note_offset)
p_paddr = struct.pack('<Q', note_offset)
p_filesz = struct.pack('<Q', len(note_content))
p_memsz = struct.pack('<Q', len(note_content))
p_align = struct.pack('<Q', 4)

phdr = p_type + p_flags + p_offset + p_vaddr + p_paddr + p_filesz + p_memsz + p_align

with open('/tmp/libcoreclr.so', 'wb') as f:
    f.write(elf_header + phdr + note_content)

print(f"Created minimal ELF with build-id {buildid_hex}, size {64+56+len(note_content)} bytes")
PYEOF
file /tmp/libcoreclr.so
readelf -n /tmp/libcoreclr.so 2>&1 || true
